summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of website redesign to match reference. All key visual and functional requirements verified successfully.
passed_tests: Header shows 'Your call' orange button instead of 'Let's talk'
Navigation does NOT have Community link
Hero section has correct 'You own a business' text structure with numbered steps
Services section has gray background (#E8E8E8) with 3 white cards
Service cards have icons inline with titles and checkmark bullets
Contact section has gray background with calendar embed
Case Studies page shows 3 updated case studies with correct content
About page shows co-founders info and image
Newsletter page shows Beehiiv embed correctly
